---
title: "GWAS Meta-Analysis Results Report"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
params:
  phenotype: ""
  results_dir: ""
  locus_annotated: ""
  credsets: []
  has_vep: false
  has_hyprcoloc: false
  has_flames: false
---

```{python}
import base64
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import display, Markdown, HTML
import pandas as pd
import glob

phenotype      = params["phenotype"]
results_dir    = Path(params["results_dir"])
locus_ann_path = Path(params["locus_annotated"])
credset_paths  = [Path(f) for f in params["credsets"]]
has_vep        = params["has_vep"]
has_hyprcoloc  = params["has_hyprcoloc"]
has_flames     = params["has_flames"]

manhattan_dir  = results_dir / "plots" / "manhattan" / phenotype
locus_plot_dir = results_dir / "plots" / "locus" / phenotype
qc_plots_dir   = results_dir / "plots" / "qc" / phenotype
vep_dir        = results_dir / "vep" / phenotype
coloc_dir      = results_dir / "colocalization" / phenotype

POP_ORDER = ["all", "eur", "afr", "amr", "eas", "csa", "mid"]

def pop_sort_key(name):
    p = name.lower()
    return POP_ORDER.index(p) if p in POP_ORDER else len(POP_ORDER)

def tbl(df, max_rows=500):
    return HTML(df.head(max_rows).to_html(
        index=False, classes="table table-striped table-sm", border=0
    ))

def img_b64(path, caption="", width="100%"):
    p = Path(path)
    if not p.exists():
        return ""
    data = base64.b64encode(p.read_bytes()).decode()
    mime = "image/png" if p.suffix == ".png" else f"image/{p.suffix.lstrip('.')}"
    cap  = f"<figcaption style='text-align:center;font-size:0.85em'>{caption}</figcaption>" if caption else ""
    return (f'<figure style="margin:0">'
            f'<img src="data:{mime};base64,{data}" style="width:{width};max-width:900px"/>'
            f'{cap}</figure>')

display(Markdown(f"**Phenotype:** {phenotype}"))
```

## Summary

```{python}
if locus_ann_path.exists():
    loci = pd.read_csv(locus_ann_path, sep="\t")
    n_loci = len(loci)
    n_pop_specific = int(loci["POPULATION_SPECIFIC"].sum()) if "POPULATION_SPECIFIC" in loci.columns else "N/A"
    pops_with_hits = set()
    if "POPULATIONS" in loci.columns:
        for row in loci["POPULATIONS"].dropna():
            pops_with_hits.update(row.split(";"))

    summary_html = f"""
<div style="display:flex;gap:20px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:1em">
  <div style="background:#e8f4fd;padding:16px 24px;border-radius:8px;min-width:140px;text-align:center">
    <div style="font-size:2em;font-weight:bold">{n_loci}</div>
    <div>GWS loci</div>
  </div>
  <div style="background:#e8f4fd;padding:16px 24px;border-radius:8px;min-width:140px;text-align:center">
    <div style="font-size:2em;font-weight:bold">{len(pops_with_hits)}</div>
    <div>Populations with hits</div>
  </div>
  <div style="background:#fff3cd;padding:16px 24px;border-radius:8px;min-width:140px;text-align:center">
    <div style="font-size:2em;font-weight:bold">{n_pop_specific}</div>
    <div>Population-specific loci</div>
  </div>
</div>
"""
    display(HTML(summary_html))
else:
    display(Markdown("> `locus_annotated.txt` not found — no lead variants identified."))
    loci = pd.DataFrame()
```

## Lead Variants

```{python}
if not loci.empty:
    display_cols = [c for c in [
        "LOCUS", "CHR", "POS", "EA", "NEA", "BETA", "SE", "P",
        "POPULATIONS", "POPULATION_SPECIFIC",
        "NEAREST_GENE", "PRIORITIZED_GENE", "PRIORITIZATION_METHOD",
    ] if c in loci.columns]

    styled = loci[display_cols].copy()
    # Format P-value
    if "P" in styled.columns:
        styled["P"] = styled["P"].apply(lambda x: f"{x:.2e}" if pd.notna(x) else "")

    def highlight_pop_specific(row):
        color = "background-color: #fff3cd"
        val = row.get("POPULATION_SPECIFIC", False) if hasattr(row, "get") else False
        return [color if val else ""] * len(row)

    html_table = (
        styled.style
        .apply(highlight_pop_specific, axis=1)
        .set_table_styles([
            {"selector": "thead tr th", "props": [("background-color", "#045ea7"), ("color", "white"), ("padding", "8px")]},
            {"selector": "td", "props": [("padding", "6px")]},
        ])
        .to_html()
    )
    display(HTML(html_table))
    display(Markdown("*Yellow rows indicate population-specific loci (no EUR or cross-population hit).*"))
else:
    display(Markdown("> No lead variants to display."))
```

## Manhattan Plots

```{python}
#| output: asis
meta_manhattan = sorted(
    glob.glob(str(manhattan_dir / f"{phenotype}-*-meta.manhattan.png")),
    key=lambda f: pop_sort_key(
        Path(f).name.replace(f"{phenotype}-", "").replace("-meta.manhattan.png", "")
    )
)

if meta_manhattan:
    md = "::: {.panel-tabset}\n\n"
    for f in meta_manhattan:
        pop = Path(f).name.replace(f"{phenotype}-", "").replace("-meta.manhattan.png", "").upper()
        md += f"## {pop}\n\n"
        md += img_b64(f, width="100%") + "\n\n"
    md += ":::\n"
    display(Markdown(md))
else:
    display(Markdown("> No meta-analysis Manhattan plots found."))
```

## Regional Locus Plots

```{python}
locus_pngs = sorted(glob.glob(str(locus_plot_dir / "*.locus.png")))

if locus_pngs:
    grid_html = '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(480px,1fr));gap:16px">\n'
    for f in locus_pngs:
        name = Path(f).stem.replace(".locus", "")
        # Filename: {CHR}-{start}-{end}-{gene}.locus.png
        parts = name.split("-")
        caption = parts[-1] if parts else name
        grid_html += img_b64(f, caption=caption, width="100%") + "\n"
    grid_html += "</div>\n"
    display(HTML(grid_html))
else:
    display(Markdown("> No regional locus plots found."))
```

## Fine-Mapping

### Credible Set Size Distribution

```{python}
img_path = qc_plots_dir / f"{phenotype}.credset-sizes.png"
html = img_b64(img_path, width="70%")
if html:
    display(HTML(html))
else:
    display(Markdown("> Credset size plot not found."))
```

### Single-Variant Credible Sets

```{python}
# Load all credsets, identify loci where CS size = 1
all_cred_frames = []
for f in credset_paths:
    try:
        df = pd.read_csv(f, sep="\t")
        if not df.empty:
            all_cred_frames.append(df)
    except Exception:
        pass

if all_cred_frames:
    all_cred = pd.concat(all_cred_frames, ignore_index=True)
    locus_sizes = all_cred.groupby("LOCUS").size()
    singleton_loci = locus_sizes[locus_sizes == 1].index
    singletons = all_cred[all_cred["LOCUS"].isin(singleton_loci)].copy()

    if has_vep:
        vep_files = glob.glob(str(vep_dir / f"{phenotype}-*.vep_annotated_credset.txt"))
        vep_frames = []
        for vf in vep_files:
            try:
                vep_frames.append(pd.read_csv(vf, sep="\t"))
            except Exception:
                pass
        if vep_frames:
            vep_df = pd.concat(vep_frames, ignore_index=True)
            vep_cols = ["SNPID", "VEP_SYMBOL", "VEP_Consequence", "VEP_IMPACT", "VEP_VARIANT_CLASS"]
            vep_keep = [c for c in vep_cols if c in vep_df.columns]
            singletons = singletons.merge(vep_df[vep_keep].drop_duplicates("SNPID"),
                                          on="SNPID", how="left")

    if not singletons.empty:
        display_cols = [c for c in [
            "SNPID", "rsID", "LOCUS", "CHR", "POS", "EA", "NEA",
            "BETA", "SE", "NEAREST_GENE", "BF_PIP",
            "VEP_SYMBOL", "VEP_Consequence", "VEP_IMPACT", "VEP_VARIANT_CLASS",
        ] if c in singletons.columns]
        singletons["BF_PIP"] = singletons["BF_PIP"].apply(lambda x: f"{x:.4f}" if pd.notna(x) else "")
        display(Markdown(f"**{len(singletons)} single-variant credible set(s):**"))
        display(tbl(singletons[display_cols]))
    else:
        display(Markdown("> No single-variant credible sets found."))
else:
    display(Markdown("> No credset files available."))
```

## Population-Specific Loci

```{python}
if not loci.empty and "POPULATION_SPECIFIC" in loci.columns:
    pop_specific = loci[loci["POPULATION_SPECIFIC"] == True]
    if not pop_specific.empty:
        display_cols = [c for c in [
            "LOCUS", "CHR", "POS", "EA", "NEA", "BETA", "SE", "P",
            "POPULATIONS", "NEAREST_GENE", "PRIORITIZED_GENE",
        ] if c in pop_specific.columns]
        display(Markdown(f"**{len(pop_specific)} population-specific locus/loci** "
                         f"(no EUR or cross-population hit):"))
        display(tbl(pop_specific[display_cols]))
    else:
        display(Markdown("> No population-specific loci identified."))
else:
    display(Markdown("> Population-specific locus information not available."))
```

## eQTL Colocalization

```{python}
if has_hyprcoloc:
    coloc_file = coloc_dir / f"{phenotype}.hyprcoloc.tsv"
    if coloc_file.exists():
        coloc = pd.read_csv(coloc_file, sep="\t")
        # Filter to PP > 0.7
        if "posterior_prob" in coloc.columns:
            coloc = coloc[pd.to_numeric(coloc["posterior_prob"], errors="coerce") > 0.7]
        if not coloc.empty:
            display_cols = [c for c in [
                "locus", "eqtl_gene", "eqtl_study", "traits",
                "posterior_prob", "regional_prob", "candidate_snp",
                "posterior_explained_by_snp",
            ] if c in coloc.columns]
            if "posterior_prob" in coloc.columns:
                coloc["posterior_prob"] = coloc["posterior_prob"].apply(
                    lambda x: f"{x:.3f}" if pd.notna(x) else ""
                )
            display(Markdown(f"**{len(coloc)} colocalising signal(s)** (posterior probability > 0.7):"))
            display(tbl(coloc[display_cols]))
        else:
            display(Markdown("> No colocalisations with posterior probability > 0.7."))
    else:
        display(Markdown("> HyPrColoc results file not found."))
else:
    display(Markdown(
        "> :information_source: **eQTL colocalization was not run** for this phenotype.\n"
        "> Set `params.eqtl_catalog_path` to enable HyPrColoc colocalization analysis."
    ))
```
